# Claim Free Solana (CFS)

> CFS is an immersive, high-performance Solana account reclamation tool.

## Overview
Claim Free Solana (CFS) is a DApp built on the Solana blockchain designed to help users identify and close empty or unused token accounts, reclaiming rent-exempt SOL deposits. 

## Features
- **Matrix-Themed Scanner**: Advanced real-time interface for wallet inspection.
- **Support for Token Standards**: Works with standard SPL tokens and the newer Token-2022 system.
- **Pay-to-Scan & Pro Automation**: Secure 0.299 SOL handshake. Pro automation can be unlocked for 0.5 SOL.
- **Security Check**: Pre-flight simulations are run before user wallet sign prompts to prevent execution failures.
- **Referral Ecosystem**: Built-in 30% commission split for referrers.
